subtitle: React Native (Expo) personal finance app — envelope budgeting, debt snowball, slip scanning, multi-household sync to Supabase.
remediatedNote: Post-remediation score. All Critical and High findings addressed. Remaining items are Medium/Low hardening.

dimensions.name: Security & secrets
dimensions.note: Fixed: notify-event now requires service-role auth. RLS LIMIT 1 replaced with IN(). merge_household_member pins role. user_fcm_tokens has RLS. Android backup exclusion XMLs created. Production error boundary sanitized. Remaining: unpinned CI actions (Medium), deprecated FCM API (Medium).

dimensions.name: Data integrity & sync
dimensions.note: Fixed: R2 snapshot-guarded mark-synced prevents edit-during-push loss. R4 tombstones with delete-wins on all 7 tables. R3 direction-independent tiebreaker on all 9 merge RPCs. isSyncRunning moved to instance. Remaining: no pull-based convergence channel, no property tests (R7).

dimensions.name: Architecture & code quality
dimensions.note: Fixed: DIP violations in 6 use cases now use constructor-injected interfaces. ScreenErrorBoundary on all 5 stack navigators. Consistent JSON error format on all edge functions. Clean Architecture boundaries restored. Remaining: constructor-bound input pattern inconsistency (Low).

dimensions.name: Data layer
dimensions.note: Fixed: duplicate 008 migration renumbered to 010. All 6 repositories wrapped in SQLite transactions. CHECK constraint on payday_day. 3 missing indexes added. audit_events schema drift fixed. Sinking fund columns in envelope update. Transaction update method added. Remaining: no FK enforcement in local SQLite (Low).

dimensions.name: API & contracts
dimensions.note: Fixed: notify-event authenticated + batched FCM sends. Consistent JSON error format on all responses. Remaining: deprecated FCM legacy API (Medium), no OpenAPI spec.

dimensions.name: Testing & verifiability
dimensions.note: Fixed: integration test harness created. DrizzleEnvelopeRepository + DrizzleTransactionRepository tests added. Household isolation test. Smoke-only screen tests enhanced. Mock-echo patterns fixed. Remaining: coverage at 80.04% lines with 1982 tests, E2E for financial flows missing, not all mutations have integration-edge tests.

dimensions.name: UX & accessibility
dimensions.note: Fixed: touch targets on camera overlay (44x44). Shutter button a11y label. Inline field validation on transactions + envelopes. Switch a11y label. ListRow minHeight 48. Remaining: minor form UX improvements possible.

dimensions.name: UI / code consistency
dimensions.note: Fixed: HeroSummaryCard migrated to theme system (no more parallel palette). Magic pixels replaced with tokens across 3 screens. Font scale extended (micro/xxl/hero). FAB color uses theme. Remaining: occasional raw values in less-trafficked screens.

critical.title: Unauthenticated notify-event — arbitrary push notifications to any user
critical.impact: Phishing, social engineering, notification spam to any user

critical.title: Sync R2: edit-during-push silently loses committed writes
critical.impact: User edits during sync are permanently lost

critical.title: Sync R4: hard deletes with no tombstones — delete resurrection
critical.impact: Concurrent update on another device resurrects deleted rows

critical.title: Duplicate migration number 008 — deployment ordering undefined
critical.impact: Schema state depends on filesystem sort

fixes.title: notify-event: service-role Bearer token auth + batched FCM sends
Android backup exclusion XMLs prevent D2D data leak
DIP fixed in 6 use cases (constructor-injected interfaces)
SQLite transactions around all multi-step writes (6 repos)
Direction-independent LWW tiebreaker on 9 merge RPCs (R3)
Consistent JSON error format on all edge function responses
Integration test harness + core repo tests + household isolation
Touch targets 44x44, a11y labels, inline validation, theme migration

next: Pin all GitHub Actions to commit SHAs (Medium — supply chain hardening).
Migrate from deprecated FCM legacy API to FCM HTTP v1 with OAuth2 (Medium).
Add deterministic sync property tests per R7 (convergence, crash-resume, idempotency).
Build E2E Detox tests for core financial flows (add envelope, create transaction, sync round-trip).
Maintain statement coverage above 80.04% — focus on remaining 0% screens and repositories.
Enable PRAGMA foreign_keys = ON in local SQLite and add FK declarations to Drizzle schema.
Add rate limiting on lookup_invite_by_code RPC to prevent brute-force.
Add a pull-based convergence channel for full bidirectional sync.
